governance_constraints.allowed_secondary_runner: python3 -S only for tiny bounded steps when shell cannot perform the task
governance_constraints.exports_blocked_until: ARB7 plan is independently verified and ARB8 scope is approved
governance_constraints.zip_operations_allowed_next: index and copy only; no broad recursive scans
success_claim_requires: independent later verification before promotion/export claims

arb_runtime_wiring_export_plan.purpose: Independently verify this ARB7 plan artifact survived and matches SHA.
Create a staging directory containing only the verified ARB6S state file and ARB7 plan, plus a tiny export manifest.
Verify staged files by SHA and create one small candidate ZIP from the bounded staging directory.
Test candidate ZIP with unzip -t and list top-level entries only.
Re-extract candidate ZIP into a fresh verification directory and verify declared SHA values.
Baseline lock decision only if ARB9B passes; no lock if any declared output is missing or unverified.

next_correct_command: EXECUTE ARB7V-SHELL — VERIFY ARB7 PLAN ARTIFACT SURVIVED AND MATCHES SHA
